case_title: WENDY NG VS. MERCK & CO., et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CASEY A. KAUFMAN RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, WENDY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-01-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATED (JCC) CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, WENDY AS TO DEFENDANT MERCK & CO. DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-17-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-02-2005

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-17-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-17-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCK & CO.
